calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for Court trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing on this day.
Dept. 218, Comm: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Special Appearance by Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Transworld systems, Inc. Plaintiff's witness: Henry Gonzales, was sworn and examined. No appearance by Defendant: Zaki Kanya Nadiri.
Exhibit 1--- Lease Agreement ---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Zaki Kanya Nadiri as follows:
Principal: $645.00
Interest: $67.33
Attorney Fees: $161.40
Costs: $253.50
for a total of $1,127.23
Counsel stipulated to the return of Exhibit.
Counsel to submit a proposed judgment by the end of business tomorrow.

April 24, 2006
Judgment rec'd in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-17-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2005 Set For Trial On Apr-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
